# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Flexible Build Workflow
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_commands:
        description: 'Custom build commands to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      shell:
        description: 'Shell to use for commands'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - bash
          - sh
          - pwsh
        default: bash
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Setup shell
        run: |
          echo "SHELL=${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          
      - name: Execute custom build commands
        run: |
          set -e
          IFS=';' read -ra COMMANDS <<< "${{ github.event.inputs.build_commands }}"
          for cmd in "${COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            echo "Executing: $cmd"
            eval "$cmd"
          done
        shell: ${{ github.event.inputs.shell }}
        
      - name: Security scan
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2
        if: always()
        
      - name: Validate commands
        run: |
          if [[ "${{ github.event.inputs.build_commands }}" =~ [^a-zA-Z0-9\.\-\_\+\=\;\s\/] ]]; then
            echo "Security violation: Invalid characters detected"
            exit 1
          fi
        shell: bash
